description: Ground-level photograph depicting a sandy landform, appearing as a spit or narrow strip of land, separating two distinct bodies of water under a clear blue sky. The water body on the right is expansive and dark, while the one on the left is calmer and appears shallower. A dense line of green trees forms the horizon in the background. Partially obscured text in the bottom left corner reads "Copernicus Land Monitoring Service". The image visually represents the characteristics of a coastal lagoon, consistent with the CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class 521 definition.
